title: KPop Demon Hunters Gets a New Movie on Netflix
summary: Netflix is making a new KPop Demon Hunters movie because the first one was very popular. The first movie is about three girls in a K-pop group who are also secret demon hunters. It might win awards at the Oscars. The directors and singers are excited to show more of Korea's music and stories in the sequel. They want to keep the fun energy from the first film. No one knows when the new movie will come out yet.

keywords.explanation: a place where you can watch movies and shows online
a new movie that continues the story of an old one
people who fight monsters called demons

background_read: KPop Demon Hunters is an animated movie on Netflix about three K-pop singers who secretly fight demons. It became very popular and might win awards. The people who made it are planning a new movie to continue the story and show more about Korea.
Article_Structure: WHO: Netflix, directors Maggie Kang and Chris Appelhans, singers like Ejae
WHAT: A sequel to KPop Demon Hunters is announced
WHERE: On Netflix, a streaming platform
WHY: Because the first movie was popular and the creators want to expand the story and show more of Korea

perspectives.description: The directors and singers are happy to share more about Korea's culture in the new movie.
